title: Best pilot
wikitext:
[]: Best pilot             Quote Post by evils_death » Mon May 11, 2009 5:14 am Most people seem to comment on how Asuka is the best pilot assuming the eva is not beserk; but I do not see how they came to this conclusion. Sure, her synch ratio is the highest (not including kaworu) but other than that she seems to me to be far too rash and did very little in the angel fights. With the exception of the easy fight with Matarael, she pretty much sucked. I believe Rei is the best pilot among the three main pilots. She has very little showing and actually did get owned quite often. However, keeping in mind that she cannot synch with it as well as the others, she is fairly good (of course, its also very possible that unit-00 is fairly bad compared to other units). I believe this is shown through the dummy system, where a Rei clone used unit-01 to a better potential than Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon May 11, 2009 6:03 am Kaworu is the best. Asuka comes second. When she's at her prime that is. Shinji gets his butt saved by his Mom too many times but he has potential. Rei is....well....she's probably a better pilot than Toji.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Mon May 11, 2009 9:06 am I go with Rei since she is know what she is doing and always does what she is told.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon May 11, 2009 9:19 am After the Blitzkrieg scene, I'd have to say Asuka. I mean, at her peak she kicked unbelievable amounts of ass!

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon May 11, 2009 10:18 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: Rei is....well....she's probably a better pilot than Toji.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon May 11, 2009 10:34 am "Oh man this is going to be so awesome, I'm going to get to pilot a giant robot! Huh? WHAT THE FU--" *boom*

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Mon May 11, 2009 10:38 am The pilot was just a dummy, anyway. No great loss.

[]:             Quote Post by Taumiel » Mon May 11, 2009 10:38 am Ok, let's check every pilot's score, based on their kills. I'm making every angel 12 points worth, so that they may be evenly divided in all cases. I'm absolutely SURE this has been done before in the forum, I'm just too lazy to search: [code:1] Pilots: Rei Asuka Shinji Angels: 3rd - - - (Berserker EVA-01) 4th - - 12 5th 6 - 6 6th - 6 6 7th - 6 6 8th - 12 - 9th 4 4 4 10th 4 4 4 11th - - - (Ritsuko Akagi) 12th - - - (Berserker EVA-01) 13th - - - (Dummy Plug System) 14th - - - (Berserker EVA-01) 15th 12 - - 16th 12 - - 17th 6 - 6 Total: 44 32 44 [/code:1] I'm awarding no points to Shinji for angels that were killed by his berserker EVA; but maybe he deserves some in the case of Zeruel. I'm awarding no points to Asuka for her fight with the MP EVAs; she made a lot of kills at the moment, but none of them were real due to her opponents' regenerative powers. Again, maybe she deserves some. Although she wasn't a pilot at that moment, I'm awarding Rei one half of Tabris' points because she helped to defeat him by cancelling the angel's AT-field, allowing Shinji to catch him. And, if we consider Yui a sort of a pilot, her score is still higher than Asuka's - 36 points (!) Finally, all these scores are quite pointless Anyway, discuss and enjoy!

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon May 11, 2009 10:42 am I don't think it's fair not to give Asuka any points for the MP Eva battle. SHe kicked all their asses, and the only reason she lost when they came back was because her Eva ran out of juice.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 11, 2009 11:11 am Taumiel wrote: she made a lot of kills at the moment, but none of them were real due to her opponents' regenerative powers.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Mon May 11, 2009 11:20 am Reichu wrote: I never quite understood the allure of arguing over "who's the most skilled at manipulating an enslaved god through the medium of their mom's/etc. soul?" Quite tasteless, really...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 11, 2009 11:27 am Baz wrote: Spare some sympathy for all the poor innocent angels who were massacred too, eh?

[]:             Quote Post by oOoOoOo » Mon May 11, 2009 11:36 am There was an episode where the pilots competed against each other in MORTAL KOMBAT to determine the ULTIMATE CHAMPION? Or did that just happen in the manga. I haven't read the manga yet. But seriously, Reichu is right on the money here. We're talking about a bunch of child soldiers (some of which are not entirely human) who are piloting pseudo-human-god-something-creatures. With each battle being unique, and emotions and the apocalypse involved, can we really use mathematics to determine this? A peer-reviewed journal would never publish this thread. ^_~ To speculate, whoever has the most open heart would be the best pilot, wouldn't they?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Mon May 11, 2009 11:39 am Kaworu is the best because of how closely he can synch with the Evas (he could control Unit 02 without even being in it, after all). Asuka comes second from a talent perspective. Both her intro battle against Gaghiel and her fight with the MP evas prove that. Shinji is third just from sheer determination. His victories aren't pretty (see the fight against Shamshel), but through a mix of following orders and personal initiative, he comes out on top most of the time. Rei doesn't really do anything noteworthy, in my opinion. She's mostly in support roles, and there's nothing special about her control of an eva or her tactics.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 11, 2009 11:49 am Gamer_2k4 wrote: Kaworu is the best because of how closely he can synch with the Evas (he could control Unit 02 without even being in it, after all).

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Mon May 11, 2009 2:41 pm Asuka is the best pilot because she was training for combat for years before she entered the series. I think she knew what she was doing in episode 8. However, Shinji was able to destroy Sachiel with no experience at all. I think he also claimed the most lives (but I might be wrong). He must have had the gods by his side considering how unwarlike he was.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 11, 2009 2:48 pm Holy Diver wrote: However, Shinji was able to destroy Sachiel with no experience at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Mon May 11, 2009 2:54 pm Reichu wrote: Holy Diver wrote: However, Shinji was able to destroy Sachiel with no experience at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon May 11, 2009 3:02 pm Who is the best Evangelion pilot?

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon May 11, 2009 4:46 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: At least one of the 18th angels.
